stemHtml: For aircraft in the heavy wake turbulence category the word "Heavy" shall be included immediately after the aircraft call sign in...

options.a: the initial radiotelephony contact between such aircraft and ATS units.
options.b: the initial radiotelephony contact between such aircraft and tower units only.
options.c: all radiotelephony contacts between such aircraft and ATS units.
options.d: all radiotelephony contact between such aircraft and the approach control unit.
